结节病.summary: 靶向CXCR6通过抑制Th17反应减轻结节病肉芽肿形成和肺纤维化。

结节病.title: Prevalence of relapse in pulmonary sarcoidosis: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
结节病.authors: Hashim Z, Baughman RP, Agarwal R, Tripathy NK, Gupta M, Khan A, Kumar A, Kumar A, Nath A
结节病.summary: 肺结节病停药或减量后复发率约为39%，前瞻性研究复发率（31%）低于回顾性研究（45%）。

结节病.title: Ocular sarcoidosis: from clinical signs to targeted interventions.
结节病.authors: El Jammal T, Jacquot R, Abramowicz S, Kodjikian L, Mathis T, Serrar Y, Sejournet L, Seve P
结节病.summary: 眼部结节病需综合诊断，慢性重症推荐早期使用激素替代治疗，新型靶向药对难治性葡萄膜炎有前景。

结节病.title: Toward Precision in Pulmonary Sarcoidosis: Lessons From CT Phenotyping.
结节病.authors: Mathias KR, Sharp M
结节病.summary: 摘要缺失。

结节病.title: Multiparametric Ultrasound Findings of Testicular Sarcoidosis.
结节病.authors: Liu H, Abudalo R, Salahia G, Yusuf GT, Huang DY, Sidhu PS
结节病.summary: 睾丸结节超声特征：小、低回声、多灶、乏血供、中软弹性，提示结节病可能。

ILD.title: Pulmonary hypertension associated with interstitial lung disease: a state-of-the-art review.
ILD.authors: Raghu G, Sahay S, Price LC, Weatherald J, Rayner SG, Behr J, Boucly A, Das M, McLaughlin V, Rahaghi F, Rutland C, Ryu JH, Saggar R, Humbert M
ILD.summary: 间质性肺病相关肺动脉高压诊断困难、预后差，需多学科个体化治疗。

ILD.title: Changes in Interstitial Lung Disease Nomenclature.
ILD.authors: Wells AU, Rajan SK
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Atezolizumab + Chemotherapy in Older Patients With Lung Cancer in Japan.
ILD.authors: Shimizu J, Nishio M, Ohashi K, Osoegawa A, Kikuchi E, Kimura H, Goto Y, Miyauchi E, Yoshioka H, Yoshino I, Misumi T, Yoshimori K, Shibata K, Tsuda T, Seike M, Ota T, Samata K, Kobayashi Y, Tanaka M, Gemma A
ILD.summary: 日本老年肺癌（≥70岁）患者接受阿特珠单抗联合化疗的疗效和安全性与年轻患者相当。

ILD.title: Interstitial lung disease in small ruminants.
ILD.authors: Cassidy JP
ILD.summary: 小反刍兽间质性肺病由感染、寄生虫及中毒因素引起，会严重损害动物健康并影响全球畜牧业生产力。

ILD.title: Toxic interstitial lung disease in cattle.
ILD.authors: Barros CSL, Riet-Correa F, Mendes RE, Rissi DR
ILD.summary: 牛的间质性肺病主要由有毒物质引起，如色氨酸、4-异丙草醇及二氧化氮等。

ILD.title: Predictors of rapidly progressive interstitial lung disease in anti-MDA5 dermatomyositis: a meta-analysis.
ILD.authors: Liu T, Ji X, Wei Y, Zhong Y, Zhu J, Wang C, Li M
ILD.summary: 抗MDA5阳性皮肌炎患者出现快速进展性间质性肺病的预测因素包括高龄、男性、发热、皮肤溃疡及关节炎等。

ILD.title: Clinical features, pathogenesis, and treatment of anti-MDA5 antibody-positive interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Yamaguchi K
ILD.summary: 抗MDA5抗体阳性间质性肺病以快速进展为特征，需早期三联免疫抑制治疗改善预后。

ILD.title: Combined immunosuppressive therapy in systemic sclerosis-associated interstitial lung disease: Phenotypes matter.
ILD.authors: Marchetti M, Motta F, Tonutti A, Selmi C, De Santis M
ILD.summary: 联合免疫抑制治疗对炎症进展性系统性硬化相关间质性肺病有效，尤其当合并皮肤、关节或肌肉受累时。

ILD.title: The evolving comorbidity landscape of rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Brooks RT, England BR, Kronzer VL, Crowson CS
ILD.summary: RA合并症谱系30年演变：间质性肺病与焦虑抑郁负担增加，心血管病减少。

ILD.title: A statistical model for lung function trajectory and mortality in patients with fibrotic interstitial lung disease.
ILD.journal: Am J Respir Crit Care Med
ILD.authors: Wendelberger B, Jensen TP, Quintana M, Stewart I, Molyneaux PL, Maher TM, Oldham JM, Johnson SR, Fahy WA, Khan F, Saini G, Abdulqawi R, Allen R, Baldi BG, Chaudhuri N, Corte TJ, Cottin V, Funke-Chambour M, Glaspole I, Holland AE, Johannson KA, Khor YH, Kreuter M, Kulkarni T, Molina-Molina M, Martinez FJ, Montesi SB, Nathan SD, Piccari L, Rajan S, Rivera-Ortega P, Ryerson CJ, Sakamoto K, Wain LV, Wells AU, Adams W, Kawano-Dourado L, Jenkins RG, Lewis RJ
ILD.summary: 该模型通过联合分析肺功能下降与死亡风险，可更准确估算肺纤维化患者的FVC年下降率（6.0%）。

ILD.title: Interstitial lung disease in patients treated with antibody-drug conjugates: a review.
ILD.authors: Petrelli F, Dottorini L, D'Alessio A, Tarantini F, Bonetti S, Rossitto M, Cherri S, Zaniboni A, Ghidini A
ILD.summary: 抗体药物偶联物相关性间质性肺病发病率约10%-15%，若进展为急性呼吸窘迫综合征则死亡率最高。

ILD.title: Integrated machine learning risk model for predicting radiation pneumonitis in lung cancer patients with interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Lu H, Jiang A, Yuan Z, Chen D
ILD.summary: 机器学习整合临床、剂量及炎症指标构建的列线图，可准确预测肺癌合并间质性肺炎患者的放射性肺炎风险。

ILD.title: Defining interstitial lung disease related to idiopathic inflammatory myopathies: a systematic review protocol of the Myositis Clinical Trial Consortium (MCTC).
ILD.authors: Triantafyllias K, Gomez R, Paul J, Appenzeller S, Bartoloni E, Benitez A, de Araujo DB, Dominguez SA, Ejaz K, Fanouriakis A, Houghton K, Janssen M, Keshavamurthy C, Khoury M, Kivity S, Landon-Cardinal O, Lopez I, Marketos N, Marrani E, Marsden JW, Mavragani C, Ngamjanyaporn P, Perelas A, Pimentel-Quiroz V, Tzilas V, Gil JDU, Vehar S, Wilson G, Wilfong E, Papadopoulou C, Aggarwal R, Hallowell R, Nagaraja V, Pais F, Joerns EK
ILD.summary: 该综述旨在为特发性炎性肌病相关间质性肺病建立共识性定义，以解决缺乏标准化命名和诊断标准的问题。

ILD.title: Telomere biology disorders in childhood interstitial lung disease: new insights from the chILD-EU cohort.
ILD.authors: Courtwright A
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: The cell with many faces: lung macrophage plasticity and function in response to environmental and pathogenic insults.
ILD.authors: Dubey S, Khan J, Alishlash AS, Matalon S
ILD.summary: 肺泡巨噬细胞在环境与病原刺激下从促炎（M1）向抗炎/修复（M2）表型转化，其功能紊乱是慢性肺病的关键驱动因素。

ILD.title: Associations of sarcopenia with the risk of incident respiratory disease and the role of inflammation and metabolism: a prospective cohort study.
ILD.authors: Cao X, Cai X, Zhang J, Yan J, Zhao Y, Jia X, Sun K, Liu Z, Chen L
ILD.summary: 肌少症显著增加呼吸系统疾病风险，炎症和代谢通路可能是关键中介机制。

ILD.title: Mechanisms of Surfactant Maturation in Development and Disease.
ILD.authors: Pranty AI, Cuevas Ocana S, Dickens JA
ILD.summary: 该文综述了肺表面活性物质成熟机制及其在发育和疾病中的异常导致呼吸功能障碍。

ILD.title: Personalized treatment of HER2-positive lung adenocarcinoma using Human Organoid Drug Sensitivity Test.
ILD.authors: Luan T, Fu S, Liu W, Wang S, Xie X, Lin X, Chenli Z, Wang L, Ma K, Ma H, Mo J, Yu B, Yang Q, Xu Y, Jin H, Chen Q, Yao L, Luan Y, Zhong N, Lv Q, Zhang Y, Zhou C
ILD.summary: 人肺癌类器官药敏测试可为HER2突变耐药患者筛选有效挽救治疗。

ILD.title: ERS Congress 2025: highlights from the Interstitial Lung Diseases Assembly.
ILD.authors: Khoury J, Yuksel A, Bizymi N, Fabozzi A, Garcia-Moyano M, Wijsenbeek M, Kreuter M, Fabbri L
ILD.summary: 2025年ERS大会间质性肺病学术亮点：涵盖ILD新进展与关键研究摘要。

ILD.title: Nintedanib combined with dual immunosuppression for interstitial lung disease in systemic sclerosis and rheumatoid arthritis: A systematic review and pooled multicentre real-world cohort study.
ILD.authors: Chioni A, Campochiaro C, Keret S, Panopoulos S, Baresic M, Varelas G, Radic M, Sebastiani M, Tektonidou MG, Sfikakis PP, Rimar D, Matucci-Cerinic M, Daoussis D
ILD.summary: 尼达尼布联合双免疫治疗可稳定系统性硬化症相关间质性肺病的肺功能。
